import io
import string
import list

fn find(_ xs: List<Int>, _ target: Int) -> Option<Int>
  list.index_of(xs, target)
end

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let parts = string.split_whitespace(line1)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  for p in parts
    match string.parse_int(p)
    when Some(n)
      nums = list.push(nums, n)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end

  let target = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(n)
    n
  when None
    0
  end

  match find(nums, target)
  when Some(i)
    println("index=#{i}")
  when None
    println("not_found")
  end
  Ok(())
end
